# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

parameters:
  appServiceName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: myWebApp
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: mySqlServer
  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: myDatabase
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: mystorageaccount
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: East US

resources:
- type: Microsoft.Web/sites
  apiVersion: "2021-02-01"
  name: "[parameters('appServiceName')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    serverFarmId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', concat(parameters('appServiceName'), 'plan'))]"
    siteConfig:
      appSettings:
      - name: "WEBSITE_NODE_DEFAULT_VERSION"
        value: "16.14.0"
      - name: "DB_CONNECTION_STRING"
        value: "[concat('Server=tcp:', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName, ',1433;Initial Catalog=', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), ';Persist Security Info=False;User ID=', parameters('sqlServerName'), ';Password=', parameters('sqlServerPassword'), ';MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;')]"
  dependsOn:
  - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
  - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
  - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', concat(parameters('appServiceName'), 'plan'))]"

- type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
  apiVersion: "2020-11-01-preview"
  name: "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    administratorLogin: "[parameters('sqlServerAdmin')]"
    administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('sqlServerPassword')]"
    version: "12.0"

- type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
  apiVersion: "2020-11-01-preview"
  name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    edition: "Basic"
    maxSizeBytes: 2147483648
    collation: "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS"
    status: "Online"

- type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
  apiVersion: "2021-04-01"
  name: "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  sku:
    name: "Standard_LRS"
  kind: "StorageV2"

- type: Microsoft.Web/serverfarms
  apiVersion: "2021-02-01"
  name: "[concat(parameters('appServiceName'), 'plan')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    serverFarmId: "[concat(parameters('appServiceName'), 'plan')]"
    sku:
      name: "F1"
      tier: "Free"
      size: "F1"
      family: "F"
      capacity: 1
